org.siprop.v2.ua
Interface UAInfo

All Superinterfaces:
java.lang.Cloneable, Info, Message, java.io.Serializable
All Known Implementing Classes:
DefaultSIPUAInfo
public interface UAInfo
extends Info

This interface holds the packet about a UA.

noritsuna
